item.title: F-003b: Table Rendering
item.intent: Tables must render as formatted, aligned tables in rich view — not as pipe-delimited text
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-038 (Parser), FEAT-003 (Core Rendering). GFM tables render as visually formatted tables with column alignment, cell padding, and header row styling. Tables are editable inline in rich view. Works with auto-format table features (FEAT-004 decomposed).
acceptanceCriteria: GFM table renders with visible column alignment and cell padding
Header row is visually distinct from data rows
Table with 10+ columns renders without horizontal overflow on iPad
Table with 100+ rows scrolls smoothly at 60fps minimum
Empty cells render as empty space, not collapsed
